achievements: Promoted to lead end-to-end feature delivery across release cycles — planned epics, broke down requirements, estimated effort, and drove predictable on-time releases through sprint tracking
Took full ownership of system health — set up centralized structured logging, distributed tracing, and dashboards across Elasticsearch and RabbitMQ to catch failure modes before they escalate
Owned the full Git workflow — PR templates, rebase policy, release tagging with changelogs, and CI/CD pipelines that gate deploys on passing tests
Mentored engineers on architecture patterns, pushed back on weak technical decisions, and participated in technical hiring
Designed the entire microservice architecture from a blank slate — defined 10+ service boundaries, chose AMQP over HTTP for internal messaging to guarantee durability
Layered Redis caching to cut hot-path latency and integrated OpenSearch for full-text search; planned horizontal (read replicas) and vertical scaling with explicit trade-off documentation
Drove TDD adoption team-wide, reaching ~80% coverage (unit/integration/e2e) using Jest and SuperTest; enforced SOLID, DRY, and consistent naming through structured code reviews
Built real-time chat, WebRTC video calls, schedule-based booking, APNs push notifications, Elasticsearch-powered search, and multi-gateway payments across 10+ independent services
Built and maintained 6+ full-stack applications under real uptime expectations — including complex ERP systems and a high-traffic multi-vendor e-commerce platform
Designed a modular monolith that progressively decomposed into microservices as traffic grew — a deliberate migration that avoided the complexity tax of going distributed too early
Integrated bKash, Nagad, Amarpay, and logistics APIs (Pathao, Steadfast, Daraz) with ACID-compliant transaction flows and full rollback paths — zero inconsistent payment records on failure
Redesigned schemas, rewrote N+1 queries, introduced compound indexes, and built aggregation pipelines — cut p95 response times on the busiest endpoints by measurable margins
